subject: UZG+ V3 Phase 2 Mockup Priority Brief LIVE; ENTA + PLUS Hub Tier 4 canons identified as critical-path; Sprint 1 quick-wins ready to dispatch
body: Authored audits/ecosystem/uzg-plus/UZG_PLUS_V3_PHASE2_MOCKUP_PRIORITY_BRIEF_v1.md (514 lines, 11 sections). Bridge document between Phase 1 (canon + audit) and Phase 2 (NTS+CLA mockups via Claude Artifacts). Synthesises Top 10 V3 priorities from Cursor UX Gap Analysis §9 against Phase 1 Dev1 canon (5 docs in canon/uzg-plus/uiux/). Coverage: 5 priorities COMPLETE (P2/P3/P4/P9/P10), 2 PARTIAL (P6/P8), 3 GAP (P1/P5/P7). Critical-path: ENTA Module + PLUS Hub Module Tier 4 canons unblock 5 of 10 priorities. Sprint sequencing: Sprint 1 (week 1-2) = 4 quick wins; Sprint 2 (week 3-4) = ENTA-dependent (P1/P8) + admin sketch; Sprint 3 (week 5-6) = PLUS Hub-dependent (P5/P7/P6). PR #32 squash-merged at e8d16bd; live mirror 200 OK on brief URL. AC-01..16 ALL PASS. Phase 2 mockup work blocked until ENTA Tier 4 canon authored.
requested_action: 1. CLA Lane_01 read brief + spot-check §3 priority matrix coverage. 2. Approve sprint sequencing OR propose revisions. 3. Begin authoring Tier 4 module canons in chat: ENTA Module canon first (during Sprint 1), PLUS Hub Module canon second (during Sprint 2). 4. Dispatch Sprint 1 quick wins per brief §6 order: P10 → P2 → P4 → P3. 5. Coordinate Cursor credentialed Playwright re-run (LANE01-UZG-PLUS-V2-AUTHENTICATED-SCREENSHOTS-V1 currently halted on credentials).
acceptance_criteria: AC-01..AC-10 all PASS at PR-create time (brief 514 lines + 10 priorities mapped + per-priority refs + verdicts + sprint sequencing + dependency map + 8 Tier 4 canons + entry checklist + DOT deliverables in audits namespace + handoff schema-conformant)
AC-11 PASS — live mirror 200 OK on brief URL
AC-15 PASS — [vercel skip] on all commits
